concept: Reação a impacto: Lee Sin recua, gira o torso, dobra um joelho, recebe um flash branco-dourado e recupera a guarda.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: non-integrated animation-lab candidate for an existing Bomba PvP Champion. Create a clean 4 by 4 sprite-animation source sheet with exactly 16 distinct sequential frames for Lee Sin performing a hit reaction: neutral stance, sudden recoil, torso twist, buckled knee, defensive hands, brief white-gold impact flash, recovery and return to ready. Preserve bald head, red headband, glowing white eyes, tan skin, gold dragon tattoo, red martial-arts pants, beads and dark sandals. Use a perfectly flat #00ff00 chroma-key background, one complete centered pose per cell, generous padding, no bomb, attacker, text or watermark.

alpha.method: remove_chroma_key.py with auto-key border, soft matte, despill
alpha.note: Raw source contains neighboring-cell bleed; re-centered derivatives still expose clipped/foreign fragments in the later poses.

validation.foreignCellFragments: observed in frames 08-11 as a partial next-pose head; frames 12-15 are top-cropped in the generated grid

grok.requestedTask: Auditar/organizar/extrair frames, spritesheet, contact sheet, preview e validar bleed, alpha e crop.
grok.result: Executou no escopo exato, terminou com exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não confirmou reparo; a inspeção local confirmou a falha.
grok.grokImagine: indisponível; não utilizado e nenhum sucesso foi inventado

origin: Arte original gerada nesta thread pelo image_gen integrado, usando apenas referências locais do Champion.
license: Origem interna do projeto; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
